name: agent-difference-method
reason: All 7 rubric criteria are satisfied: (1) Agent abstract class defines difference(ctx: DifferencingContext) -> DifferencingResponse as an abstract method. (2) DifferencingContext is defined with output_dir_a, output_dir_b, project_intent, and response_file_path fields. (3) DifferencingResponse is defined with status (equivalent/divergent), dimensions (list of DimensionResult), and summary fields. (4) DimensionResult is defined with name, status (pass/fail), and rationale fields. (5) CLIAgent implements difference by rendering the differencing prompt template and reading the response file. (6) ClaudeAgent implements difference following the same pattern as CLIAgent (using render_differencing_prompt and _run_noninteractive), consistent with the existing composition-based architecture where ClaudeAgent independently implements all Agent methods rather than inheriting from CLIAgent. (7) MockAgent accepts an optional differencing_response, records calls in difference_calls list, and returns the configured response. All types are Pydantic BaseModel subclasses with model_config extra=ignore, making them fully JSON-serializable.
